title: GAGAKU Wooden Pizza Toys for Kids 27Pcs Wood Cooking Toy Cutting Play Food Set for Toddlers Pretend Play Kitchen Accessories for Children Aged 3-8, for Boys and Girls
features: Creative Pizza Fun: This pretend pizza set for kids comes complete with 6 sliceable pizza wedges, 15 different toppings, a pizza slicer, a serving utensil, a rolling pin, a pizza crust, a serving plate, and a baking sheet. Children can explore their culinary creativity by combining various toppings to create their own unique pizza creations. The self-adhesive tabs on the pizza slices offer a realistic cutting experience, and kids will enjoy the satisfying sound as they "slice" through the pizza.

Developmental Play: More than just a toy, this pretend food set is a wonderful early learning resource for children ages 3 to 8. It fosters creativity, encourages counting, sorting, and storytelling, while also improving dexterity and coordination through cutting and sharing activities. It’s a fantastic way to learn while having fun.

Child-Safe Materials: Crafted from premium wood and finished with child-safe, water-based paints, this pizza toy is durable, easy to maintain, and provides a secure play environment for young chefs. It's a great present idea for both boys and girls ages 3 and older.

Screen-Free Play: This wooden pizza toy is a great addition to any play kitchen, offering kids a hands-on, imaginative alternative to screen-based entertainment. Encourage children to engage in creative cooking scenarios, away from digital devices, enhancing their role-playing skills and providing hours of engaging fun.

Perfect Gift for Toddlers: This wooden pizza set makes a fantastic present for children ages 3 to 8. Adding this wooden pizza cutting toy to their playtime routine provides children with an engaging, screen-free option. It encourages children to imagine themselves as chefs, improves their counting skills, and teaches them to be helpful around the home. It's the perfect wooden pretend play toy.
description: Product Description GAGAKU 27Pcs Wooden Pizza Toys Play Food Set for Kids This wooden pizza set makes a fantastic present for children ages 3 to 8. Adding this wooden pizza cutting toy to their playtime routine provides children with an engaging, screen-free option. Our designed wooden pizza toy complements most kitchen playsets, offering kids a screen-free option for engaging and creativity-sparking play. Let children immerse themselves in imaginative cooking, away from digital distractions, enhancing the pretend play experience and providing hours of fun. Wooden Pizza Set Pretend Play Kitchen Accessories for Kids Wooden Pizza Set Children can learn how to count and distribute toppings while making pizza, fostering basic math skills. Different Fruits & Vegetables The wooden pizza set helps children develop their perception of colors and recognize vegetables and fruits. Designed for Small Hands The size of each accessory is suitable for the hands of children aged 3-8 years old. Wooden Pizza Tray The pizza set is made from high-quality wood and coated with non-toxic, odorless water-based paint, ensuring safety and durability with smooth edges. Pretend Play Pizza Toy This children's kitchen accessory pizza toy includes 6 sliceable pizza pieces, 15 toppings, 1 pizza cutter, 1 pizza spatula, 1 rolling pin, 1 pizza base, 1 pizza paper plate, and 1 pizza baking tray, allowing children to freely mix and match different flavors of pizza. The pizza pieces adhere with self-stick tabs, providing kids with a realistic cutting experience, and they will love the "crunch" sound made by the cutter as it slices through the pizza. Promoting parent-child relationships Parents can take part in role-playing games to improve the relationship between parent and child and play together. Fun toys The pizza set can develop your child's color perception, recognize vegetables and fruits, train your child's memory and patience, improve fine hand movements and promote social skills and language expression. Perfect Gift for Kids This wooden pizza set is an exceptional gift for children aged 3 to 8. Adding the wooden pizza cutting toy set enriches the pretend play experience, providing kids with an engaging, screen-free option. It inspires children to play the role of chefs and teaches them to be little helpers for mom.
